structural_claim: For B=1,2,3 the spectrum is Casimir-linear (R^2~1) and NOT Regge-linear (R^2<0.99): the C3-1 death criterion triggers identically => universal.
numerical_caveat: alpha_C ~ E_class/I and the fixed-profile axial ansatz keeps I ~ B-independent, so alpha_C tracks the mass (alpha_C(B) ~ B). This is an ARTIFACT of the un-relaxed ansatz, not a physical statement; a clean test needs relaxed B>=2 solitons. INDETERMINATE.
